description:
Two doc touchpoints:

1. docs/user-manual/src/configuration/ (or whichever page documents the module API): add a short section explaining that tellerLib and tellerRegistry default to the bundled teller+toolbox setup, and the two scenarios for overriding them (private registry overlay; alternate teller revision). Link to inputs.turnkey.lib.defaultTellerLib / .defaultTellerRegistry as the standalone helpers.

2. docs/user-manual/src/getting-started/ (or the project-setup page): update the example to use the collapsed consumer pattern (drop tellerLib + tellerRegistry from the example block).

If CLAUDE.md mentions the boilerplate anywhere, update it too.
title: Document the new defaults + override points
